summary: Phase 2 Admin Panel Testing Complete - Full-screen pages with persistent sidebar navigation working correctly. All admin routes, forms, and navigation tested successfully.

design_issues.issue: Console warnings about HTML hydration errors with <span> inside <option> and <select> elements
design_issues.note: This is a React hydration warning, not a functional issue

passed_tests: Admin login at /admin with credentials admin/admin123 redirects to /admin/dashboard
AdminDashboard shows stats cards (Empresas: 3, Artículos: 3, Actividades: 10, Archivos: 7)
AdminDashboard shows module cards with correct counts (Empresas: 3, Artículos: 3, Actividades: 10, Categorías: 5, Media: 7)
Persistent sidebar navigation present on all admin pages
Sidebar nav items: Dashboard, Empresas, Artículos, Actividades, Categorías, Media, Configuración
AdminEmpresas page at /admin/empresas shows list of 3 empresas with search and category filter
Click 'Nueva Empresa' navigates to /admin/empresas/nueva with full-screen EmpresaForm
EmpresaForm has all fields: nombre, categoría, descripción, imágenes (logo/hero), galería, contacto, mapa, actividades
AdminArticulos page at /admin/articulos shows list of 3 articles with search
Click 'Nuevo Artículo' navigates to /admin/articulos/nuevo with ArticuloForm
ArticuloForm has fields: titulo, resumen, contenido editor, hero image, publicado checkbox
AdminActividades page at /admin/actividades shows list of 10 activities
Click 'Nueva Actividad' navigates to /admin/actividades/nueva with ActividadForm
ActividadForm has fields: nombre, descripcion, color presets, icon upload, orden, activa
AdminCategorias page at /admin/categorias shows 5 categories grid with modal for create/edit
AdminMedia page at /admin/media shows upload zone and media library with 7 files
AdminSettings page at /admin/configuracion shows hero image, title, subtitle settings
Logout button in sidebar works and redirects to /admin login page
Public pages working: / (home), /empresas (catalog with 3 empresas), /mapa (map with markers)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
AdminLayout component correctly wraps all admin pages with persistent sidebar
Navigation between pages maintains sidebar state
Forms have proper validation and field structure
Stats API calls working correctly on dashboard
seed_data_creation: Existing seed data: 3 empresas, 3 artículos, 10 actividades, 5 categorías, 7 media files
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 admin panel refactoring complete. All admin pages now use full-screen layouts with persistent sidebar (AdminLayout). Dashboard shows stats and module cards. Empresas/Artículos/Actividades have listing pages with 'Nueva' buttons that navigate to full-screen forms. Categorías uses modal for create/edit. Media and Settings pages working. All navigation and logout working correctly.
